assertions.description: design_observations correctly identifies I2C buses on I2C3_SCL/I2C_SDA with pullups (R8, R7 to +3.3V) and I2C1 without pullups. MCP2551 CAN transceiver captured in subcircuits. AMS1117 regulator caps observation correctly flags missing caps.

U9 XB24CDMPIT-001 is an 802.15.4 RF transceiver module. The rf_chains and rf_matching arrays are both empty. The analyzer has subcircuits for this IC but fails to classify it as an RF device, missing an important design feature.
